note: Items Claude is waiting on. Decide here; each choice gives a copy-and-relay handoff to close the loop.

items.title: Switch GitHub Pages source to "GitHub Actions"?
items.detail: Gives a clean root URL (no /dashboard/ suffix) and auto-refreshed data on every push. Requires Settings -> Pages -> Build and deployment -> Source = GitHub Actions.

items.title: Build a live approvals backend?
items.detail: Lets you click Approve here and have Claude act automatically, instead of the copy-and-relay handoff. Needs a small always-on service (new infra/permission).
